name: Midea Real Estate Holding Limited
summary: Midea Real Estate Holding Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a property developer in the People's Republic of China. It develops and sells residential and industrial properties, as well as provides property management services; smart home solutions, including smart home systems, central control systems, lighting control systems, curtain control systems, security systems, water and electricity control systems, health systems, and home appliances systems; and various smart commercial properties, hotels, schools, elderly care, and healthcare facilities. The company also invests in and operates commercial properties, such as urban complexes, community centres, long-term rental apartments, hotels, and cultural tourism projects. In addition, it is involved in prefabricated construction. Midea Real Estate Holding Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Foshan, the People's Republic of China.
